facebook.caption:
4.9 stars from 136 divers. That's not luck, that's consistency.

Phil Hai Diving Club on 68 Đường Trần Hưng Đạo is where serious divers and first-timers both show up. Small crew, real instruction, and the kind of underwater Phu Quoc most tourists never see.

If the ocean is on your itinerary, this is the spot to book first.

Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
facebook.video_caption: Gear check. Briefing done. Drop in. Phil Hai Diving Club runs one of the tightest dive operations on the island. 4.9 stars from 136 reviews tells you everything.

instagram.caption:
4.9 stars. 136 divers. Phil Hai Diving Club earns it every time.

Book before you arrive. Tag your dive buddy.
instagram.video_caption: Fins on, mask set, go. Phil Hai Diving Club, 4.9 stars, 136 reviews. Phu Quoc underwater hits different.
